title: Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT) Q3 2024 Earnings - Key Metrics Versus Estimates Analysis
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics reported Q3 2024 results that significantly beat analyst expectations across multiple metrics. The consensus estimate for Q3 2024 revenue was $399.88 million, while consensus EPS estimate was -$0.15.

Actual Results vs. Estimates: Total net product revenue of approximately $430 million, marking a 39% growth compared to the previous year. The reported revenue represented a surprise of +16.83% versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate. The company delivered an EPS surprise of +513.33%.

Product Performance: ELEVIDYS revenue reached $181 million, representing nearly 50% quarter-over-quarter growth. PMO franchise sales reached approximately $149 million, including EXONDYS 51, VYONDYS 53, and AMONDYS 45.

Profitability Milestone: The company achieved profitability on both GAAP and non-GAAP bases in Q3 2024. Management stated the company now expects to be sustainably profitable for both the GAAP and non-GAAP perspective, with positive cash flow expected early in 2025.

ELEVIDYS Performance: Management noted that ELEVIDYS performance substantially exceeded prior guidance, as well as analyst consensus. The gene therapy continued to drive strong momentum with 3-5 month patient conversion timelines and minimal cannibalization of PMO sales.

Pipeline and Strategic Moves: Discontinued SRP-5051 (PPMO) program due to persistent hypomagnesemia safety concerns, despite encouraging dystrophin expression results. SRP-9003 for LGMD Type 2E: BLA filing planned for 2025. Forward 2025 guidance: $3 billion revenue target.
